violations.text: Cold hold drawer located in the sandwich prep area was not in good repair (ambient of 50 degrees F). No TCS items were observed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of pink debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to clean and sanitize. Ice disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Various items were observed held between 46-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed items in freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC refilled buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
Cold hold drawers located in the sandwich prep area was not in good repair (ambient of 56 degrees F). PIC removed TCS items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC covered. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of yellow, orange, pink, and black debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Various items were observed held between 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Cold hold drawers were observed in poor repair in the sandwich prep area (ambient of 50 degrees F). PIC removed TCS items. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the Pepsi cooler, prep tables, and storage equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The floor under the front counter area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
